name: cedi-agent-plugins
description: Cedi's marketplace for reusable Claude Code agent skills and workflows

plugins.name: git-workflows
plugins.description: Git and GitHub workflows: changelog generation, PR creation, and PR review.

plugins.name: documentation
plugins.description: Documentation authoring workflows: co-authoring docs and strategic design documents.

plugins.name: product-design
plugins.description: Product and UX design workflows grounded in psychology: cognitive load, behavior design, and trust.

plugins.name: mental-models
plugins.description: Reasoning and problem-solving frameworks: five whys, graph thinking, and tit-for-tat.
